subject: HireOS AI interview invitation for Data Engineer
body_text:
Hi man,

You have been invited to the HireOS AI interview flow for the Data Engineer role.

Candidate interview link: http://localhost:3000/interview/7d1d0cff-34f9-4873-9bd1-2d6f059ba796
Google Calendar event draft: https://calendar.google.com/calendar/render?action=TEMPLATE&text=HireOS%20AI%20interview%20-%20Data%20Engineer&details=Candidate%20portal%20link%3A%20http%3A%2F%2Flocalhost%3A3000%2Finterview%2F7d1d0cff-34f9-4873-9bd1-2d6f059ba796%0A%0ARecruiter%20note%3A%20AI-generated%20interview%20scores%20are%20decision-support%20signals%20and%20should%20be%20reviewed%20by%20a%20human%20recruiter.&add=rohankumardubey497%40gmail.com
The recruiter can save that event and send the calendar invite to you.

Please reply if you need a different time or accommodation.

Best,
HireOS AI Recruiting
